seo.title: Building Data Extraction with Haystack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build data extraction with Haystack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building data extraction pipelines with Haystack enables structured output from unstructured documents using schema-guided LLMs, powering RAG and automation workflows. Guardrails are essential to catch schema violations, hallucinations, and retrieval failures that undermine reliability in production. Vex integrates seamlessly as a custom component to verify outputs against your extraction schema.

architectureOverview.heading: Data Extraction Architecture with Haystack
architectureOverview.description:
A typical Haystack data extraction pipeline starts with a DocumentStore (e.g., InMemoryDocumentStore) loaded with unstructured PDFs or texts. An EmbeddingsRetriever fetches relevant documents using semantic search, followed by a PromptBuilder that formats the retrieval context with a Pydantic schema for structured extraction. The core LLM component (e.g., OpenAIChatGenerator) generates JSON output guided by the schema, which a custom OutputParser validates for completeness.

For production, pipelines are serialized and deployed via Haystack's Pipeline API. Vex slots in as a verification node post-LLM to check schema compliance, field accuracy, and type consistency before forwarding to downstream consumers like databases or APIs.

This modular design allows easy iteration on retrievers, prompts, and models while maintaining strict output guarantees critical for enterprise data pipelines.

risks.name: Pipeline component output type mismatches
risks.description: Retriever outputs non-Document types or LLM returns malformed JSON, breaking downstream parsing
risks.mitigation: Vex schema validation catches type errors before parser failures

risks.name: Retriever returning irrelevant documents
risks.description: Semantic search misses key context, causing empty or inaccurate extractions
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies extraction completeness against expected field population

risks.name: Generator hallucinating beyond retrieved context
risks.description: LLM fabricates data not grounded in retrieved documents
risks.mitigation: Vex cross-checks extracted values against document context spans

risks.name: Custom component errors silently swallowed
risks.description: Vex or parser exceptions get dropped, masking production failures
risks.mitigation: Vex error reporting with structured traces and fallback routing

implementation.title: Define Pydantic Schema for Extraction
implementation.description: Create a structured model for invoice data extraction with validation.
implementation.code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from typing import Optional, List

class InvoiceItem(BaseModel):
    description: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
    quantity: int = Field(..., ge=1)
    unit_price: float = Field(..., ge=0)

class Invoice(BaseModel):
    invoice_number: str = Field(..., pattern=r'^INV-\d{6}')
    date: str = Field(..., pattern=r'^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}')
    total_amount: float = Field(..., ge=0)
    items: List[InvoiceItem] = Field(..., min_items=1)

implementation.title: Build Basic Extraction Pipeline
implementation.description: Core pipeline with retriever, prompt template, and LLM generator.
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline
from haystack.components.retrievers import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIChatGenerator
from haystack.components.builders import PromptBuilder

retrieval = InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever(document_store=doc_store)
generator = OpenAIChatGenerator(model="gpt-4o")
prompt_builder = PromptBuilder(template="""Extract invoice data as JSON:\n{{context}}\nSchema: {{schema_json}}""")

pipeline = Pipeline()
pipeline.add_components([retrieval, prompt_builder, generator])
pipeline.connect('retrieval', 'prompt_builder')
pipeline.connect('prompt_builder', 'generator')

implementation.title: Custom Output Parser Component
implementation.description: Parse and validate LLM JSON output against Pydantic schema.

implementation.description: Load documents and execute extraction with query.

vexIntegration.title: Install Vex and Define Verifier Schema
vexIntegration.description: Setup Vex SDK and create verifier matching extraction schema.
vexIntegration.code:
pip install haystack-ai vex-sdk

from vex import Verifier, Guard
from pydantic import BaseModel

class InvoiceGuard(Guard):
    schema = Invoice.model_json_schema()
    checks = [
        'schema_compliance',
        'field_accuracy>80%',
        'completeness>95%',
        'type_consistency'
    ]

verifier = Verifier(guards=[InvoiceGuard()])

vexIntegration.description: Create VexVerifier component that integrates into pipeline.

vexIntegration.description: Insert VexVerifier between generator and final output.
